query:
SELECT 'license_entities' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM bench_license_neural_entities
UNION ALL SELECT 'license_edges', COUNT(*) FROM bench_license_neural_edges
UNION ALL SELECT 'license_memories', COUNT(*) FROM bench_license_neural_memories
UNION ALL SELECT 'au_tax_entities', COUNT(*) FROM bench_au_tax_neural_entities
UNION ALL SELECT 'au_tax_edges', COUNT(*) FROM bench_au_tax_neural_edges
output:
tbl,rows
license_entities,2103
license_edges,2367
license_memories,0
au_tax_entities,4264
au_tax_edges,3729
